Work Description: In today's session, I began exploring the practical implementation of AI agents as discussed previously. I focused on understanding how to structure different agents based on specific domains and started planning the architecture for building them. I also initiated setting up the n8n environment and explored its interface, nodes, and workflow creation process. Additionally, I reviewed examples of automation workflows to understand how data flows between different nodes and how AI functionalities can be integrated.
Learnings: I learned how to break down a project into smaller components for building multiple AI agents. I gained a basic understanding of n8n workflows, including triggers, actions, and integrations. I also understood how automation tools can simplify complex processes and how AI agents can be connected with APIs and services to perform real-world tasks.
